rules.title: Credit rating for CDI issuance
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No credit rating obtained from at least one credit rating agency."

rules.title: Debenture trustee requirement for CDI
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No debenture trustee appointed in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act and SEBI regulations."

rules.title: Option to not convert if conversion price is not determined
rules.failReason: fun i => "Has convertible debt instruments with conversion price not determined."

rules.title: Warrant tenure ≤ 18 months
rules.failReason: fun i => "Has warrants with tenure exceeding 18 months."

rules.title: Warrant exercise price formula and upfront payment
rules.failReason: fun i => "Does not have warrant exercise price formula determined upfront or at least 25% of the consideration amount based on the exercise price not received upfront."

rules.title: Warrant non-exercise forfeiture
rules.failReason: fun i => "Has warrants with consideration not forfeited within three months of non-exercise."

rules.title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
rules.failReason: fun i => "Incorrect specified securities ineligible.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (I)(a)(i)
rules.check: fun i => i.conditions.exists (fun c => c = 1 && i.securities_held_by_promoters.exists (fun s => s.2 != Cash))
rules.failReason: fun i => "Missing specified securities acquired for consideration other than cash.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Specified securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution (I)(a)(ii)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Missing specified securities resulting from a bonus issue.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Lock-in of specified securities held by the promoters
rules.failReason: fun i => "Missing lock-in period for specified securities.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Lock-in period for promoter contribution
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Promoter contribution not locked in for at least 18 months.\", remedy? := some \"Lock-in promoter contribution for a period of 18 months from the date of allotment."

rules.title: Lock-in period for promoter excess holding
rules.check: fun i => i.securities_held_by_promoters.filter (fun s => s > i.fully_paid_up_equity_shares).all (fun s => s >= 6 * 30)
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Promoter excess holding not locked in for at least 6 months.\", remedy? := some \"Lock-in promoter excess holding for a period of 6 months from the date of allotment."

rules.title: Lock-in of pre-issue capital held by non-promoters
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Pre-issue capital held by non-promoters not locked in for 6 months.\", remedy? := some \"Lock-in pre-issue capital held by non-promoters for a period of 6 months from the date of allotment."

rules.title: Exceptions to lock-in for non-promoters
rules.check: fun i => i.exceptions.exists (fun e => e.some == "employee stock option" || e.some == "employee stock purchase scheme")
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No exceptions specified for equity shares allotted to employees or held by employee stock option trusts.\", remedy? := some \"Specify exceptions for equity shares allotted to employees or held by employee stock option trusts."

rules.title: Lock-in for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds
rules.check: fun i => i.exceptions.exists (fun e => e.some == "venture capital fund" || e.some == "alternative investment fund")
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No lock-in period specified for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds.\", remedy? := some \"Specify a lock-in period of at least 6 months from the date of purchase for equity shares held by venture capital funds or alternative investment funds."

rules.title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities not held by promoters or ineligible."

rules.title: Lock-in for specified securities (a)
rules.check: fun i => i.conditions.exists (fun c => c = 1) && i.securities.any (fun s => s = 68) && i.lead_manager_appointment
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities not locked-in according to clause (a) of regulation 16 or not held by promoters."

rules.title: Lock-in for specified securities (b)
rules.check: fun i => i.conditions.exists (fun c => c = 2) && i.securities.any (fun s => s = 68)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Specified securities not locked-in according to clause (b) of regulation 16 or not held by promoters."

rules.title: Pledge conditions (a)
rules.check: fun i => i.conditions.exists (fun c => c = 1) && i.lead_manager_appointment
rules.failReason: fun i => "Loan not granted to the issuer company or its subsidiary(ies) for financing one or more of the objects of the issue."

rules.title: Pledge conditions (b)
rules.failReason: fun i => "Loan not granted with pledge of specified securities as a term."

rules.title: Appointment of lead manager(s)
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Lead Manager(s) not appointed.",
    remedy? := none

rules.title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr, not > 50% monetary assets
rules.failReason: fun i => if i.net_tangible_assets < 30000000 then "Net tangible assets below ₹3 cr" else if i.net_tangible_assets * 0.5 >= i.monetary_assets then "More than 50% monetary assets", remedy? := some "Adjust net tangible assets or monetary assets to meet the requirements."

rules.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason: fun i => if (i.operating_profits.length != 3) then "Need 3 full-year operating profit figures." else let fails := (List.zip (List.range i.operating_profits.length) i.operating_profits).filter (fun p => p.snd < 150000000); let years := fails.map (fun p => s!"Year {p.fst + 1}"); "Operating profit below ₹15 cr in: " ++ String.intercalate ", " years, remedy? := some "Demonstrate ≥ ₹15 cr operating profit in each of the last 3 full financial years (restated, consolidated)."

rules.title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of last 3 years
rules.failReason: fun i => if (i.net_worth.length != 3) then "Need 3 full-year net worth figures." else let fails := (List.zip (List.range i.net_worth.length) i.net_worth).filter (fun p => p.snd < 1000000); let years := fails.map (fun p => s!"Year {p.fst + 1}"); "Net worth below ₹1 cr in: " ++ String.intercalate ", " years, remedy? := some "Demonstrate ≥ ₹1 cr net worth in each of the last 3 full financial years (restated, consolidated)."

rules.title: Amount for general corporate purposes limit
rules.failReason: fun _ => "The amount for general corporate purposes exceeds 25% of the total net worth."

rules.title: Amount for other unidentified objects limit (without exceeding 25%)
rules.failReason: fun _ => "The amount for other unidentified objects exceeds 25% of the total net worth."

rules.title: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
rules.failReason: fun i => "Missing specified securities ineligible.", remedy? := none

rules.title: Maximum holding period for equity shares offered for sale
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Equity shares offered for sale have been held for less than one year."

rules.title: Holding period exception for equity shares
rules.check: fun i => i.fully_paid_up_equity_shares && i.securities.exists (fun s => s = ConvertibleSecurities)
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Equity shares received on conversion or exchange of compulsorily convertible securities not found."

rules.title: Holding period compliance at draft offer
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Holding period of one year not complied with at the time of filing the draft offer document."

rules.title: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation
rules.failReason: fun _ => "No agreement with a depository for dematerialisation found."

rules.title: Promoter's specified securities in dematerialised form
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Specified securities held by promoters are not in dematerialised form."

rules.title: Fully paid-up equity shares or forfeited
rules.check: fun i => i.fully_paid_up_equity_shares || i.securities_held_by_promoters.all (fun s => i.securities.find? (fun ss => ss = s)?.2.forfeited)
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Existing partly paid-up equity shares are not fully paid-up or forfeited."

rules.title: Issuer may issue CDI without equity IPO
rules.failReason: fun _ => "Issuer is in default of payment or repayment for more than six months."

rules.title: Default payment or repayment period
rules.failReason: fun i => "Has defaulted on payment or repayment of debt instruments for more than six months."

issuer_questions.question: What are the compulsorily convertible securities?
Has at least one debenture trustee been appointed in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act and SEBI regulations?
What conditions apply to the specified securities?
Has credit rating been obtained from at least one credit rating agency?
Is the issuer eligible to make an initial public offer of convertible debt instruments without making a prior public issue of its equity shares and listing thereof?
Are there any exceptions to lock-in for equity shares allotted to employees or held by employee stock option trusts?
What is the number of fully-paid up equity shares held by promoters?
What is the amount for general corporate purposes (≤25% of net worth)?
How long have equity shares been held before offering them for sale?
Was the holding period complied with at the time of filing the draft offer document?
Have you appointed one or more merchant bankers as lead manager(s)?
What is the lock-in period for pre-issue capital held by non-promoters (in days)?
What is the net tangible assets?
What is the net worth for the last 3 years?
What are the operating profits for the last 3 years?
What is the amount for other unidentified objects (≤25% of net worth)?
Are all specified securities dematerialised?
What are the specified securities?
Which specified securities are held by promoters and their lock-in period?
Which specified securities are ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution?
